title: Team Column, Not People+Team Column
excerpt: My company almost always wants to assign items to a Team or Teams instead of people. Currently the People column allows us to do that, but it is a hassle to search for teams or scroll through a list of People + Teams. Ca…

posts.author: taylortaylor (Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: My company almost always wants to assign items to a Team or Teams instead of people. Currently the People column allows us to do that, but it is a hassle to search for teams or scroll through a list of People + Teams. Can Monday or someone create a Team column that is identical in use to People, but filters the options down to only company teams?

posts.author: ikyu_72 (Stacy)
posts.cookedHtml: @taylortaylor I was heading here to try to find a solution to this very need. Any luck?

posts.author: taylortaylor (Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Stacy, I haven’t. This seems like an easy fix, but I haven’t found a way around it.

posts.author: Sotiris (bootstraps)
posts.cookedHtml:
This would be a great idea.
Or the possibility to restrict the people column to only teams!
